feed.title: Memedroid
feed.subtitle: Trending memes from memedroid.com (no native feed; scraped from the server-rendered homepage).

entry.title: damn Jeremy Clarkson has the cancer
What five year old me thought my pikachu would look like after hyper training it
She spoke for all the drivers
entry.content: She spoke for all the drivers

entry.title: Is it hatred or merely population control?
How about a story about an MMA event on the Whitehouse lawn
How do you like dem apples?
Geh motivations & the dead family prophesy
Libs loved him, now they HATE him..
Making them is the fun part
Not about you OR the boys
UN is a useless bunch of bureaucrats
Not how anyone thinks of Over the Hedge really ending
Idc that skulls of my enemies aren't dishwasher safe
